title: Teradyne (TER) Down 5.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Teradyne (TER) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Teradyne: Semicon ATE Market Leader
text: The company and Advantest are market leaders in the semiconductor ATE with over 60% of the market share combined. It has long-standing relationships with major OSATs and IDMs including TSMC as its largest customer as it expands in the OSAT market.
